title: 🔥定投价值信号明确
body: 市场处于底部积累期。AHR999(3D)录得0.50处于定投区，价格$80,622较200日成本偏离-2.5%。估值回归长期支撑线，指标7日上涨6.2%反映底部承接意愿增强，定投赔率具吸引力。偏多。左侧布局时机到了吗？
body_en: The market is in a bottom accumulation phase. AHR999 (3D) sits at 0.50, placing us squarely in the DCA zone. At $80,622, price is deviating just -2.5% from the 200-day cost basis. Valuation is reverting to the long-term support line, and with the 7-day indicator up 6.2%, buying pressure at the bottom is strengthening. The risk-reward for DCA is attractive. Bias: Bullish. Is it time for left-side entry?
